title: dodonaea viscosa f. burmanniana
intro: Dodonaea viscosa f. burmanniana, also known as the stick bush, is a variety of the Dodonaea viscosa plant, a native Australian species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dodonaea viscosa f. burmanniana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and respiratory issues.
